DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Molly Thai; 408-356-3000; appearing as counsel for defendant Real Time Resolutions, Inc.
Chioma Chiks-Orji; Estavillo Law Group; 510-982-3001; appearing as counsel for plaintiff Fredy Martinez.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT REAL TIME RESOLUTIONS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege any viable causes of action against the moving defendants on their 3rd attempt to do so. Plaintiff provides no argument in opposition that amendment may be possible.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-21-668264 WITH CASE CGC-21-596717
Off Calendar Feb-25-2022 Continued To Mar-15-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Elizabeth B. Cermak; Law Offices of Jason Estavillo, PC; 510-982-3001; appearing on behalf of plaintiff Fredy Martinez.
Raymond Jereza; ZBS Law, LLP; 714-848-7920; appearing on behalf of defendant Real Time Resolutions, Inc.
Katalina Baumann; Troutman Pepper Hamilton Sanders LLP; 949-622-2700; appearing on behalf of defendant Nationstar Mortgage LLC dba Mr. Cooper.

Hearing held. Counsel for defendant Real Time Resolutions, Inc. states that they did not have enough time to obtain the documentation requested in the court's tentative ruling, and seeks a continuance. Plaintiff's counsel objects to defendant's request for continuance. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF FREDY MARTINEZ'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-21-668264 WITH CASE CGC-21-596717 is continued to March 15, 2022. Notice waived on all sides. No later than March 11, 2022 defendant Real Time Resolutions to provide (file and serve with a hard courtesy copy delivered to Department 501) the following evidence: (1) 6 monthly mortgage bills for the months immediately preceding the recordation of the Notice of Default or a ledger reflecting the amounts owed/billed and amounts received for those months; (2) insurance bills and proof of payment for the periods already paid, if any; and (3) tax bills and proof of payment for the periods already paid, if any.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
